seoTitle: Nilma North vs Nine Mile — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nilma North and Nine Mile. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nilma North vs Nine Mile: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nilma North and Nine Mile.
heading: Nilma North vs Nine Mile — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nilma North, Victoria and Nine Mile, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nine Mile has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Nilma North (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nilma North or Nine Mile safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nilma North has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Nine Mile scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nilma North scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Nine Mile scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nilma North or Nine Mile?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nine Mile has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
